title: poa infirma
intro: Poa infirma, also known as weak meadow-grass or weak meadow grass, is a type of plant species belonging to the grass family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Poa infirma include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Poa infirma can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
